title: senecillis dolichobotrys
intro: Senecillis dolichobotrys, also known as Groundsel Tree, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecillis dolichobotrys include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Groundsel Tree can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
